title: Glossary Term
description: A single domain term entry in the project glossary. Defines the canonical code name and business meaning for use by AI agents and developers.

title.description: Human-readable title of the glossary file, e.g. 'Digital Battery Passport Glossary'

domain.description: Domain scope. Use 'all' if terms apply across all domains.

updated.description: Date of last update in YYYY-MM-DD format

name.description: Human-readable term name as it appears in business documents

definition.description: Clear business definition of the term in domain language

code_name.description: Canonical camelCase identifier for use in code, APIs, and database columns

aliases.description: Alternative names or synonyms used in conversation or documentation
